keyMappings:
map J nextTab
map K previousTab
map <c-d> scrollPageDown
map <c-u> scrollPageUp
searchEngines:
m: https://leta.mullvad.net/search?q=%s&engine=google Mullvad Leta | Google
mb: https://leta.mullvad.net/search?q=%st&engine=brave Mullvad Leta | Brave
g: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s Google
gm: https://www.google.com/maps?q=%s Google Maps
yt: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s Youtube
b: https://search.brave.com/search?q=%s Brave Search
b: https://www.bing.com/search?q=%s Bing
d: https://duckduckgo.com/?q=%s DuckDuckGo
q: https://www.qwant.com/?q=%s Qwant
wp: https://www.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia
aw: https://wiki.archlinux.org/index.php?search=%s Arch Wiki
arch: https://archlinux.org/packages/?sort=&q=%s&maintainer=&flagged= Arch Official Repositories
aur: https://aur.archlinux.org/packages?O=0&K=%s Arch User Repositories
pip: https://pypi.org/search/?q=%s PyPI
gh: https://github.com/search?q=%s&type=repositories GitHub Repositories
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/search?q=%s npm
